title: Shri Tulsi Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Tulsi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Tulsi.
description:
Jai Jai Tulsi Mata,
Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata.
Sab jag ki sukh daata,
Sabki var mata॥
॥ Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata ॥

Sab yogon se upar,
Sab rogon se upar.
Raj se raksh karke,
Sabki bhav trata॥
॥ Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata ॥

Batu putri hai Shyama,
Sur balli hai Gramya.
Vishnupriya jo nar tumko seve,
So nar tar jaata॥
॥ Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata ॥

Hari ke sheesh virajat,
Tribhuvan se ho vandit.
Patit janon ki taarini,
Tum ho vikhyata॥
॥ Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata ॥

Lekar janm vijan mein,
Aayi divya bhavan mein.
Manav lok tumhi se,
Sukh-sampati paata॥
॥ Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata ॥

Hari ko tum ati pyari,
Shyam varn sukumari.
Prem ajab hai unka,
Tumse kaisa naata॥
Hamari vipad haro tum,
Kripa karo mata॥
॥ Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata ॥

Jai Jai Tulsi Mata,
Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata.
Sab jag ki sukh daata,
Sabki var mata॥
॥ Maiya Jai Tulsi Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Tulsi Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: Performing Tulsi Aarti brings positive energy into the home, removes negativity, and ensures peace and prosperity in the family through the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Tulsi Mata?
faq.a2: Thursday and the 'Ekadashi' date of every month are considered the best days for Tulsi worship.
faq.q3: What should be offered to Mother Tulsi during Aarti?
faq.a3: Offering pure water, lighting a lamp of pure ghee, and tying a sacred thread (Mauli) are considered very dear to her.
faq.q4: Can Tulsi Mata's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, performing the Aarti with full devotion in the courtyard or balcony where the Tulsi plant is kept is highly auspicious.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti for peace of mind?
faq.a5: Chanting the mantra 'Om Tulasyai Namah' or 'Shri Tulsi Devyai Namah' helps to focus the mind and brings inner peace.
